principles: 先完成 vertical slice，再做横向扩展
先完成采购穿行 MVP，再做 RAG / Agent / Evaluation
Human Review 优先于自动结论
证据链优先于漂亮 UI
不在 tracker 里的功能默认不开发
mvp_boundary: MVP 只交付采购穿行 vertical slice
MVP 不实现完整 RAG 四库
MVP 不实现完整 Evaluation Center
MVP 不实现完整 Bad Case Center UI
MVP 不实现完整 Agent Workflow
MVP 不实现销售、函证、访谈、合同审核扩展场景
MVP 允许保留证据索引、规则 evidence、基础测试、demo data、Provider 接口和后续扩展接口
不得在 Phase 10 完成前开发 Post-MVP 功能
user_field_policy: MVP 阶段不实现完整 RBAC
MVP 阶段所有 user 相关字段使用 nullable UUID、nullable string 或 actor_name 记录操作者，不强制 FK 到 users
Phase 19 实现 users / roles / user_roles 后，再评估是否回填真实外键
在 Phase 19 前，不允许为了 owner_id / uploaded_by / reviewed_by 等字段提前实现完整认证系统

tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 0 skeleton implementation.

Docker Desktop started; docker compose config passed; PostgreSQL container startup verified; pg_isready returned accepting connections; select 1 query succeeded; container status healthy.

tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 1 task and document upload implementation.

tasks.title: 实现 Task Center 和上传组件
tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 1 task and document upload implementation.

tasks.title: 创建 audit_tasks 和 documents 表
tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 1 task and document upload implementation.

tasks.title: 实现 task 和 document API
tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 1 task and document upload implementation.

tasks.title: 添加任务和文件上传 API 测试
tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 1 task and document upload implementation.

acceptance_criteria: 可创建 procurement 任务
可上传六类采购文件
文件保存到 local_storage/uploads
documents 记录包含 hash 和 storage_path

tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 2 document parsing and pages implementation.

tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 2 document parsing and pages implementation.

tasks.title: 实现 OCR 和 pages API
tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 2 document parsing and pages implementation.

tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 2 document parsing and pages implementation.

acceptance_criteria: 每份文档可生成 document_pages
每页包含 page_number、raw_text、ocr_blocks
OCR 失败可记录错误状态
分类服务可读取页级文本
phases.notes: Phase 2 completed: document_pages migration, text PDF page parsing with PyMuPDF, Basic OCR Provider boundary for images, OCR status/error recording, OCR/pages APIs, Task Center page text viewer, and OCR API tests. Phase 3 classification and later modules were not implemented.

phases.name: 文档分类
deliverables: document type display and correction UI

tasks.title: 实现六类采购文档分类
tasks.notes: Implemented rule keyword + filename ClassificationService for six procurement document types and unknown handling.

tasks.title: 展示 doc_type、置信度和分类理由
tasks.notes: Task Center shows doc_type, confidence, reason, low-confidence review marker, alternatives, and manual correction form.

tasks.title: 使用 documents 分类字段保存结果
tasks.notes: Added documents classification fields for confidence, reason, alternative_types, and original_classification while reusing doc_type/review_status.

tasks.title: 实现 classify API 和人工修正入口
tasks.notes: Implemented POST /api/v1/documents/{document_id}/classify and PATCH /api/v1/documents/{document_id} for manual doc_type correction.

tasks.title: 添加六类采购样例分类测试
tasks.notes: Added classification API tests for six types, low confidence, manual correction, original reason preservation, and un-OCRed rejection.

acceptance_criteria: 六类采购文件可被分类
分类结果包含 doc_type、confidence、reason
低置信度进入复核标记
人工修正不覆盖原始分类理由
phases.notes: Phase 3 completed: implemented heuristic ClassificationService using OCR page text and filename, six procurement doc_type labels plus unknown, low-confidence need_review marking, manual doc_type correction with original_classification preservation, classification API, Task Center display/correction UI, and classification API tests. Phase 4 extraction and Post-MVP classification expansion were not implemented.

phases.name: 字段抽取与 Schema 校验

tasks.title: 实现 ExtractionService 和六类文档 Schema
tasks.notes: Implemented ExtractionService, six procurement document schema specs, Pydantic validation, null + warning missing-field behavior, and basic normalizers.

tasks.title: 实现字段表、置信度和来源展示
tasks.notes: Task Center now provides Extract action and read-only field table with confidence, source page/source text, missing, low-confidence, and warning markers.

tasks.title: 创建 extracted_fields 表
tasks.notes: Added extracted_fields table with required metadata, normalized JSON, source evidence fields, nullable corrected_by/corrected_at, and no users FK.

tasks.title: 实现 extract 和 fields API
tasks.notes: Implemented POST /api/v1/documents/{document_id}/extract, GET /api/v1/documents/{document_id}/fields, and GET /api/v1/tasks/{task_id}/fields.

tasks.title: 添加 Schema 校验、缺字段和标准化测试
tasks.notes: Added extraction tests for schema completeness, Pydantic validation, missing fields, date/amount normalization, line_items, invalid provider JSON, and fields APIs.

acceptance_criteria: 六类采购文档都有 MVP 字段列表
每个字段可追溯到页码和来源片段
缺失字段输出 null 和 warning
抽取结果可被 Rule Engine 读取
phases.notes: Phase 4 completed: implemented extracted_fields migration, six procurement MVP schemas, regex/heuristic ExtractionService, basic date/amount/tax-rate/name normalization, missing-field null + warning behavior, basic line_items structure, extract/fields APIs, Task Center field table, and extraction tests. Phase 5 business aggregation, Phase 6 rule judgment, Phase 8 field correction, and Post-MVP features were not implemented.

phases.name: 采购业务归集

tasks.title: 实现 LinkageService 和 business_key 生成
tasks.notes: Implemented LinkageService with stable CONTRACT/INVOICE/TASK group business_key generation and low-confidence need_review marking.

tasks.title: 展示业务链路和低置信度归集
tasks.notes: Task Center now shows business_key, Link Documents action, read-only document relations, confidence, low-confidence marker, and evidence.

tasks.title: 创建 document_relations 表
tasks.notes: Added documents.business_key and document_relations table with relation_type, confidence, and evidence JSONB.

tasks.title: 实现 link-documents API
tasks.notes: Implemented POST /api/v1/tasks/{task_id}/link-documents and GET /api/v1/tasks/{task_id}/document-relations.

tasks.title: 添加合同号、一对多和低置信度归集测试
tasks.notes: Added linkage tests for contract number grouping, invoice/payment purpose grouping, low-confidence fallback, one-to-many payments, relation writes, and missing-field warning.

acceptance_criteria: 能生成 business_key
能生成 document_relations
归集证据可查看
低置信度归集不自动通过
phases.notes: Phase 5 completed: implemented LinkageService, documents.business_key, document_relations migration, task-scoped document linkage APIs, Task Center relation display, explicit contract/invoice linkage, payment purpose and voucher summary assisted linkage, supplier/date/amount low-confidence fallback, need_review marking for low-confidence groups, and linkage API tests. Phase 6 Rule Engine, Review Center, complex graph matching, cross-task linkage, and manual relation editing were not implemented.

phases.name: Rule Engine MVP

tasks.title: 实现 RuleContext、RuleResult 和 rule registry
tasks.notes: Implemented RuleEngineService with RuleContext, RuleResult, EvidenceRef, and deterministic Python rule registry.

tasks.title: 实现六条采购 MVP 规则
tasks.notes: Implemented PROC_MISSING_001, PROC_TIME_001, PROC_AMOUNT_001, PROC_NAME_001, PROC_QTY_001, and PROC_TAX_001 without LLM pass/fail judgment.

tasks.title: 展示规则结果、expected、actual 和 evidence
tasks.notes: Task Center now runs audit rules and shows read-only rule_code, status, severity, message, expected_value, actual_value, evidence, and review marker.

tasks.title: 创建 audit_rules 和 audit_results 表
tasks.notes: Added audit_rules and audit_results tables, six seed rules, enabled/version/parameters support, and nullable reviewed_by.

tasks.title: 实现 audit、audit-results 和 rules API
tasks.notes: Implemented POST /api/v1/tasks/{task_id}/audit, GET /api/v1/tasks/{task_id}/audit-results, GET /api/v1/audit-results/{result_id}, and GET /api/v1/rules.

tasks.title: 为每条规则添加 pass、fail、need_review 测试
tasks.notes: Added rule engine API tests covering six-rule pass, non-pass/need_review, missing fields not passing, evidence, many invoices/payments, low-confidence warning, rules API, result list, and result detail.

acceptance_criteria: 六条 MVP 规则可执行
规则输出包含完整 RuleResult 字段
缺字段输出 need_review
高风险 fail 进入 Review Center
规则单测可运行
phases.notes: Phase 6 completed: implemented deterministic RuleEngineService, RuleContext, RuleResult, EvidenceRef, Python rule registry, six procurement MVP rules, audit_rules/audit_results migration with six seeded rules, audit/rules APIs, Task Center read-only rule results, and tests for pass/non-pass, missing fields, evidence, many invoices/payments, and low-confidence warning. Phase 7 Audit Workbench, Phase 8 Review Center, Phase 12 Rule Center, RAG, Agent, and LLM pass/fail judgment were not implemented.
scope_notes: MVP 中 PROC_QTY_001 只覆盖基础 line_items 数量一致性
MVP 中 PROC_TAX_001 只覆盖基础税率、税额、含税/不含税口径校验
完整品种一致性、复杂多品种逐行匹配、单位换算、item_key 标准化和复杂品种映射后置到 Post-MVP Rule Center / 规则增强阶段
MVP 不新增独立 PROC_ITEM_001，除非 Phase 6 完成后仍有明确时间

phases.name: Audit Workbench 前端工作台

tasks.title: 提供工作台聚合数据查询
tasks.notes: Reused existing read APIs for documents, pages, task fields, and audit results; no new mutable backend workflow was introduced.

tasks.title: 实现左文档、中证据、右字段和规则的三栏工作台
tasks.notes: Implemented AuditWorkbenchPage with left document list, middle OCR text viewer, right field table and rule result table, empty/loading/error states, and Task Center entry.

tasks.title: 校验证据定位字段满足工作台展示
tasks.notes: Verified existing documents.business_key, extracted_fields.source_page/source_text, and audit_results.evidence are sufficient for Phase 7 evidence navigation; no migration added.

tasks.title: 复用或实现 workbench 聚合 API
tasks.notes: Added frontend client wrapper for GET /api/v1/tasks/{task_id}/fields and reused existing pages/audit-results/documents endpoints; no /workbench endpoint was needed.

tasks.title: 验证异常点击能定位证据片段
tasks.notes: Validated with backend pytest, frontend production build, docker compose config, and JSON validation; evidence jumps are implemented through field source refs and rule evidence refs.

acceptance_criteria: 用户可在一个页面查看文档、字段、规则结果
异常可以定位到来源文档和页级文本
不依赖完整 bbox 高亮也能完成复核
页面能支撑 MVP 演示
phases.notes: Phase 7 completed a read-only Audit Workbench using existing Phase 1-6 APIs: task documents, document pages, task fields, and audit results. Implemented three-column document/OCR/fields-and-rules UI, field source_text navigation, rule evidence navigation via matched extracted_fields, Task Center entry, and a read-only ReviewDrawer placeholder. No new database table, schema migration, rule logic, Review Center action, field correction, exception confirmation/rejection, or rule rerun was added.

phases.name: Review Center 基础复核闭环

tasks.title: 实现 ReviewService 字段修正、确认、驳回、重跑
tasks.notes: Implemented ReviewService for review queue, field correction, confirm, dismiss, rerun, comments, and audit log writes.

tasks.title: 实现复核队列和复核操作 UI
tasks.notes: Implemented Review Center queue UI, field correction drawer, confirm/dismiss/rerun buttons, comment history, and Audit Workbench ReviewDrawer review actions.

tasks.title: 创建 review_comments 和 audit_logs 表
tasks.notes: Added 0007 migration and models for review_comments and audit_logs; reused audit_results.review_status and extracted_fields verification metadata without users/RBAC tables.

tasks.title: 实现 review、field correction、confirm、dismiss、rerun API
tasks.notes: Implemented GET /review/queue, GET/POST /review/comments, PATCH /fields/{field_id}, confirm/dismiss/rerun audit result endpoints.

tasks.title: 测试 before/after、驳回原因、重跑规则和 audit_logs
tasks.notes: Added review API tests for queue, comments, before/after field correction, source evidence preservation, dismiss reason validation, confirm, high-risk pending behavior, rerun, and audit_logs.

acceptance_criteria: 异常结果能进入复核队列
字段修正不覆盖原始证据
确认和驳回异常可记录
字段修正后可重跑规则
复核动作可审计
phases.notes: Phase 8 completed ReviewService, review_comments and audit_logs migration, review queue, field correction with before/after audit trail, source_page/source_text/source_bbox preservation, audit result confirm/dismiss with required dismiss reason, rerun through existing RuleEngineService.run_audit, review comments create/list APIs, Review Center UI, comment history, and Audit Workbench ReviewDrawer real review actions. No Phase 9 report export, complete Bad Case Center, complete RBAC, RAG, Agent, or Post-MVP feature was implemented.
scope_notes: MVP 阶段 Review Center 不实现完整 Bad Case Center UI
MVP 阶段可以预留 bad_case_candidate 概念，但不开发完整 Bad Case 流程
实际 Bad Case 创建、筛选、根因分析、修复方案和回归评测在 Phase 14 完成

phases.name: Report Center 控制表与异常清单导出

tasks.title: 实现 ReportService 和 xlsx 导出
tasks.notes: Implemented ReportService and a standard-library xlsx writer that exports all six MVP sheets and saves files under local_storage/reports.

tasks.title: 实现报告预览、生成状态和下载入口
tasks.notes: Implemented Report Center generation status, control table preview, report history, xlsx download link, and Task Center entry.

tasks.title: 创建 control_table_rows 和 reports 表
tasks.notes: Added 0008 migration and models for control_table_rows and reports; report storage_path and summary JSON are persisted.

tasks.title: 实现报告生成、列表和下载 API
tasks.notes: Implemented POST /tasks/{task_id}/reports/control-table, GET /tasks/{task_id}/reports, and GET /reports/{report_id}/download.

tasks.title: 测试 xlsx sheets、异常清单、证据索引和报告记录
tasks.notes: Added report API tests for xlsx creation, sheet names, exceptions with rule_code/evidence, field corrections, report records, control_table_rows, and download.

acceptance_criteria: 可导出 xlsx
xlsx 包含 Summary、Procurement Control Table、Exceptions、Evidence Index、Field Corrections、Rule Definitions
异常清单不隐藏失败规则
证据索引包含文件、页码、来源文本
phases.notes: Phase 9 completed ReportService, stdlib xlsx writer, Summary, Procurement Control Table, Exceptions, Evidence Index, Field Corrections, and Rule Definitions sheets, reports and control_table_rows migration, report files saved under local_storage/reports, report metadata persisted in reports, control rows persisted in control_table_rows, report summary with control table preview, generate/list/download APIs, Report Center UI with status, preview, history, and xlsx download, Task Center entry, and report API/xlsx tests. No Phase 10 README/Docker final delivery, PDF report, template system, Dashboard, RAG, Agent, Evaluation, RBAC, or Post-MVP feature was implemented.

phases.name: MVP 测试、演示数据、README 和 Docker 交付

tasks.title: 清理 MVP API 响应和错误处理
tasks.notes: Confirmed MVP API path stability and added ModelInvocation persistence support for model-call audit records without adding RAG, Agent, Evaluation, or RBAC features.

tasks.title: 打磨 MVP 演示路径和空状态
tasks.notes: Verified the MVP navigation path Task Center -> Audit Workbench -> Review Center -> Report Center through frontend build; retained existing empty/loading/error states without adding Dashboard or Post-MVP pages.

tasks.title: 创建 model_invocations 表并验证 migrations
tasks.notes: Added model_invocations table migration and validated the full migration chain on a temporary empty PostgreSQL database through alembic upgrade head.

tasks.title: 运行规则、API、导出和 E2E demo smoke tests
tasks.notes: Added end-to-end procurement MVP smoke test and verified alembic upgrade head, 47 backend pytest cases, report export tests, frontend build, docker compose config, and PostgreSQL health checks.

tasks.title: 补齐 README、API 草稿和 demo 说明
tasks.notes: Updated README and added docs/api_reference.md, docs/mvp_acceptance.md, samples/procurement/README.md, and synthetic demo_seed.json with safety and scope boundaries.

tasks.title: 验证 Docker Compose 一键启动
tasks.notes: Validated docker compose config, PostgreSQL container healthy status, pg_isready, and select 1 database connectivity after Docker Desktop was running.

acceptance_criteria: 新环境可以按 README 启动
采购穿行 MVP 能从任务创建跑到报告导出
不包含真实密钥和真实敏感数据
测试命令可运行
Phase 10 完成后才允许启动 Post-MVP
phases.notes: Phase 10 completed MVP reproducible delivery: model_invocations model and migration, synthetic procurement demo samples, seed_demo_data.py, MVP smoke test, README, API draft, MVP acceptance record, Docker/PostgreSQL verification, frontend build, pytest, and temporary empty-database migration validation. No Phase 11 or Post-MVP feature was implemented.

phases.name: RAG 四库扩展

tasks.title: 实现 RagService、chunking、embedding、retrieval 和 citation
tasks.notes: Implemented RagService with document parsing, chunking, deterministic local embeddings, pgvector retrieval, metadata filtering, citations, no-answer handling, and workpaper/public knowledge-base isolation.

tasks.title: 实现 Knowledge Center 和 citation 展示
tasks.notes: Implemented Knowledge Center with four-knowledge-base document list, document create/upload, index build, retrieval test, citation score/metadata display, and no-answer display; Audit Workbench now shows rag_citations read-only when present.

tasks.title: 创建 rag_documents、rag_chunks 并启用 pgvector
tasks.notes: Added 0010 migration enabling pgvector and creating rag_documents/rag_chunks with metadata and vector embedding columns; Docker PostgreSQL image switched to pgvector/pgvector:pg16.

tasks.title: 实现 RAG 文档入库、索引、查询和 chunk API
tasks.notes: Implemented RAG document create/list, document index, query, and chunk detail APIs under /api/v1/rag.

tasks.title: 测试 chunking、metadata filter、no-answer 和 citation schema
tasks.notes: Added RAG API tests for chunking, metadata filter, no-answer, citation schema, workpaper/public isolation, and deterministic local embeddings; full pytest passed.

acceptance_criteria: 四库可分别入库和检索
workpaper 与公开知识库隔离
回答包含 citations
检索不到依据时返回证据不足
phases.notes: Phase 11 completed RAG four-knowledge-base expansion: pgvector extension, rag_documents and rag_chunks migrations, RagService, deterministic local embedding provider, text/PDF parsing, paragraph/fixed-length chunking, metadata filters, pgvector retrieval, citations, no-answer handling, workpaper/public knowledge-base isolation, RAG APIs, Knowledge Center UI, and RAG tests. No Phase 12 Rule Center, Phase 13 Agent Workflow, Phase 14 Bad Case/Evaluation, RBAC, or other scenario expansion was implemented.

phases.name: Rule Center 规则版本化与参数配置

tasks.title: 扩展 RuleEngineService 参数加载和版本追踪
tasks.notes: Extended RuleEngineService parameter loading while preserving the Python rule registry. Supports enabled/disabled rules, version tracking, tolerance_amount, tolerance_ratio, allowed_tax_rates, supplier_aliases, item_mappings, prepayment_allowed, and date_tolerance_days without DSL or LLM pass/fail judgment.

tasks.title: 实现 Rule Center 列表、详情、参数编辑和测试入口
tasks.notes: Implemented Rule Center with rule list, details, enabled switch, parameter JSON editor, version display/editing, and dry-run rule evaluation against selected tasks.

tasks.title: 完善 audit_rules parameters、version、enabled 和审计日志
tasks.notes: Reused audit_rules.parameters, audit_rules.version, and audit_rules.enabled; added audit_results.rule_version migration and wrote rule changes to existing audit_logs.

tasks.title: 实现 rules CRUD 和 evaluate API
tasks.notes: Implemented POST /api/v1/rules, PATCH /api/v1/rules/{rule_id}, and POST /api/v1/rules/{rule_id}/evaluate while preserving existing GET /api/v1/rules.

tasks.title: 测试启用禁用、参数变更、版本写入和审计日志
tasks.notes: Added rule center API tests for enable/disable, amount tolerance, supplier aliases, item mappings, rule_version persistence, audit_logs, dry-run evaluate, registry-only create, and parameter validation.

acceptance_criteria: 规则可启用和禁用
规则参数可配置
规则版本可追踪
规则结果可复现
phases.notes: Phase 12 completed Rule Center configuration: deterministic Python registry remains the rule authority; rule enabled state, version, approved parameters, dry-run evaluation, audit_logs, and audit_results.rule_version are implemented. No Phase 13 Agent Workflow, Evaluation Center, Bad Case Center, RBAC, DSL, user expression execution, or LLM audit judgment was implemented.

phases.name: Agent Workflow 状态机与工具调用

tasks.title: 实现 AgentService、状态机、工具白名单和重试
tasks.notes: Implemented AgentService as a fixed procurement state machine with a strict tool whitelist, agent run creation, step recording, failed-step retry, and human review routing. The agent calls existing services and does not perform free chat, autonomous planning, or direct pass/fail judgment.

tasks.title: 实现 AgentStateTimeline 和失败重试入口
tasks.notes: Implemented AgentStateTimeline in Audit Workbench with run status, current state, step list, input/output references, duration, errors, and failed-step retry action.

tasks.title: 创建 agent_runs 和 agent_steps 表
tasks.notes: Added agent_runs and agent_steps tables through migration 0012_agent_workflow, storing state, status, input/output reference payloads, errors, duration, and timestamps.

tasks.title: 实现 agent runs、steps 和 retry API
tasks.notes: Implemented POST /api/v1/agents/runs, GET /api/v1/agents/runs/{run_id}, GET /api/v1/agents/runs/{run_id}/steps, and POST /api/v1/agents/runs/{run_id}/retry.

tasks.title: 测试状态合法性、重试、人工复核路由和 Rule Engine 约束
tasks.notes: Added agent workflow API tests covering legal state transitions, run and step records, failed-step retry, high-risk review routing, Rule Engine enforcement, no auto-confirm, no-citation handling, and reference-style payloads without raw sensitive text.

acceptance_criteria: Agent 可从上传推进到报告生成
每一步有状态、输入引用、输出引用和耗时
失败步骤可重试
Agent 不能自动确认高风险异常
Agent 不能绕过 Rule Engine 直接生成 pass/fail
Agent 不能在无 citation 时生成依据性结论
phases.notes: Phase 13 completed controlled Agent Workflow: agent_runs and agent_steps persistence, fixed state machine, whitelisted tool calls, retry, human review routing, RAG no-answer handling, AgentStateTimeline, and API tests. The agent does not bypass Rule Engine, auto-confirm high-risk exceptions, generate citation-free evidence conclusions, expose full raw text in step payloads, or implement Phase 14 Bad Case/Evaluation, RBAC, sales, confirmation, interview, contract review, free chat, or autonomous planning.

phases.name: Bad Case Center 与 Evaluation Center

tasks.title: 实现 BadCaseService 和 EvaluationService
tasks.notes: Implemented BadCaseService and EvaluationService with Bad Case create/list/get/update/filter, synthetic smoke evaluations, failed sample conversion to Bad Cases, and regression over open/fixed Bad Cases.

tasks.title: 实现 Bad Case Center 和 Evaluation Center
tasks.notes: Implemented Bad Case Center and Evaluation Center pages with Bad Case list/create/filter/status update, evaluation run form, metrics display, failed case display, and Audit Workbench entry to Bad Case Center.

tasks.title: 创建 bad_cases 和 evaluation_results 表
tasks.notes: Added bad_cases and evaluation_results tables through migration 0013_bad_case_eval, including payloads, expected/model output, root cause, fix plan, status, severity, owner_name, metrics, failed_cases, dataset_name, model_name, prompt_version, and rule_version.

tasks.title: 实现 bad case 和 evaluation API
tasks.notes: Implemented POST/GET/PATCH bad case APIs and evaluation run/list/detail APIs under /api/v1.

tasks.title: 测试 Bad Case CRUD、规则评测、字段 expected 对比和回归评测
tasks.notes: Added quality API tests for Bad Case CRUD/filtering, Evaluation run/results, Rule metrics and failed-case conversion, extraction expected JSON comparison, RAG no-answer/citation guard, Agent state validity, and regression evaluation.

acceptance_criteria: 能创建和筛选 Bad Case
每个 Bad Case 有输入、输出、期望、根因、修复方案
评测结果记录指标和失败样例
Bad Case 能进入回归评测
phases.notes: Phase 14 completed Bad Case Center and Evaluation Center using synthetic smoke datasets only. Evaluation types cover classification, OCR, extraction, rule, RAG, Agent, end_to_end, and regression. Metrics include limitations and failed_cases; failed samples are converted to open Bad Cases for regression. No Phase 15 sales walkthrough, confirmations, interviews, contract review, RBAC, real sensitive data, fake metrics, production monitoring, or main business rule changes were implemented.

phases.name: 销售穿行扩展

tasks.title: 定义销售 doc_type、Schema、归集和规则
tasks.notes: Implemented sales doc types, field schemas, classification keywords, extraction support, linkage bridge, and SALES_MISSING/TIME/AMOUNT/NAME/QTY rules while preserving procurement rules.

tasks.title: 支持 sales 场景字段、规则、复核和报告展示
tasks.notes: Task Center can create sales tasks and upload sales doc types; existing Workbench/Review handle sales fields and results; Report Center previews sales control rows.

tasks.title: 复用现有表并支持 sales scenario
tasks.notes: Reused audit_tasks, documents, extracted_fields, document_relations, audit_rules, audit_results, review_comments, reports, and control_table_rows; no sales_* tables or migration were added.

tasks.title: 复用现有 API 并增加 sales 参数校验
tasks.notes: Reused task/document/classify/extract/link/audit/review/report APIs with sales scenario and doc_type validation; report API emits sales_control_table for sales tasks.

tasks.title: 添加销售分类、抽取、规则和导出测试
tasks.notes: Added sales classification, extraction, linkage, audit, review queue, and xlsx export tests; full backend pytest passed and procurement tests still pass.

acceptance_criteria: 至少一组销售穿行样例端到端跑通
销售异常能进入 Review Center
销售报告可导出
不影响采购 MVP
phases.notes: Phase 15 completed sales walkthrough extension by reusing existing generic tables and APIs. Implemented sales scenario validation, sales doc types, scenario-aware extraction schemas, sales classification, linkage, deterministic SALES_* rules, Sales Control Table xlsx export, frontend sales task/upload/report support, synthetic sales sample data, and sales API tests. No sales-specific tables, confirmations, interviews, contract review, RBAC, complex revenue recognition, forecasting, or Phase 16+ features were implemented.

phases.name: 函证模块扩展

tasks.title: 定义函证 Schema、抽取和差异比对规则
tasks.notes: Added confirmation schema specs, extraction validation, classification keywords, confirmation_no linkage, and five deterministic CONF_* rules with evidence and missing-field review behavior.

tasks.title: 支持 confirmation 场景字段、差异复核和报告
tasks.notes: Task Center supports confirmation task creation and document upload types; existing Workbench/Review Center render confirmation fields and rule results; Report Center previews confirmation reports.

tasks.title: 优先复用现有表支持函证场景
tasks.notes: Reused audit_tasks.scenario, documents.doc_type/business_key, extracted_fields, audit_rules, audit_results, review_comments, reports, and control_table_rows; no confirmation-specific tables were created.

tasks.title: 复用文档、抽取、规则、复核和报告 API
tasks.notes: Reused existing task, document, OCR, classify, extract, linkage, audit, review, and report APIs with confirmation scenario validation and report output.

tasks.title: 添加函证字段、日期、金额和差异调节测试
tasks.notes: Added confirmation API tests covering task creation, classification, extraction, date inversion, amount mismatch, missing adjustment, review queue, report export, and adjustment behavior.

acceptance_criteria: 能抽取函证核心字段
能比对账面金额、回函金额和差异金额
差异样例进入 Review Center
可导出函证差异清单
phases.notes: Phase 16 completed confirmation walkthrough extension by reusing existing generic tables and APIs. Implemented confirmation scenario validation, confirmation doc types, field schemas, classification, extraction, confirmation_no linkage, CONF_* rules, Review Center queue reuse, confirmation exception report export, Evaluation classification sample, frontend task/report support, and synthetic confirmation sample data. No confirmation_* dedicated tables, external confirmation platform, auto-sending, email, bank interface, seal/signature authenticity judgment, RBAC, new Agent, or new RAG capability was added.

phases.name: 访谈模块扩展

tasks.title: 定义访谈 Schema、关键回答抽取和差异规则
tasks.notes: Added interview schema specs, extraction validation, classification keywords, interviewee_name linkage, and five deterministic INTERVIEW_* rules with evidence and review routing.

tasks.title: 支持访谈长文本、关键回答和复核展示
tasks.notes: Task Center supports interview task creation and interview document upload types; existing Workbench/Review Center render interview fields and rule results; Report Center previews interview reports.

tasks.title: 优先复用现有表支持访谈场景
tasks.notes: Reused audit_tasks.scenario, documents.doc_type/business_key, extracted_fields, audit_rules, audit_results, review_comments, reports, and control_table_rows; no interview-specific tables were created.

tasks.title: 复用 OCR、抽取、规则和复核 API
tasks.notes: Reused existing task, document, OCR, classify, extract, linkage, audit, review, and report APIs with interview scenario validation and report output.

tasks.title: 添加访谈字段、来源证据、缺签字和差异测试
tasks.notes: Added interview API tests covering task creation, classification, extraction source evidence, signature rule, date range rule, amount/counterparty differences, review queue, and report export.

acceptance_criteria: 能抽取访谈核心字段
能识别提及金额、主体、关键回答
缺签字、日期异常和底稿差异进入 Review Center
phases.notes: Phase 17 completed interview walkthrough extension by reusing existing generic tables and APIs. Implemented interview scenario validation, interview doc types, field schemas, classification, extraction, interviewee_name linkage, INTERVIEW_* rules, Review Center queue reuse, interview evidence report export, Evaluation classification sample, frontend task/report support, and synthetic interview sample data. No interview_* dedicated tables, speech recognition, recording upload handling, automatic factual adjudication, signature authenticity judgment, identity document recognition, external fact checking, contract review, RBAC, new Agent, or new RAG capability was added.

phases.name: 合同审核模块扩展

tasks.title: 定义合同字段和条款 Schema、抽取和规则
tasks.notes: 已定义 contract_review 场景、五类合同审核 doc_type、合同字段/关键条款 Schema、合同分类关键词和七条 CONTRACT_* 确定性规则；特殊条款只输出 warning 与 evidence，不生成法律意见。

tasks.title: 支持条款展示、来源片段和风险复核
tasks.notes: Task Center 支持创建 contract_review 任务和上传合同审核文档；现有 Workbench/Review Center 复用字段、source_text、规则结果和复核队列；Report Center 支持合同审核预览。

tasks.title: 优先复用 extracted_fields 和 JSONB 条款结构
tasks.notes: 未新增 contract_* 专用表；合同条款复用 extracted_fields.value_normalized/source_text/source_page，规则和报告复用 audit_rules、audit_results、reports、control_table_rows。

tasks.title: 复用文档处理、抽取、规则、复核和报告 API
tasks.notes: 复用现有 task/document/OCR/classify/extract/link/audit/review/report API；POST /tasks 支持 scenario=contract_review，report API 可生成 contract_review_report。

tasks.title: 添加基础字段、缺失条款、特殊条款和 evidence 测试
tasks.notes: 新增合同审核端到端 API 测试，覆盖任务创建、五类合同文档分类、字段抽取、关键条款缺失、特殊条款、主体/金额差异、签章缺失、Review Queue 和 xlsx 导出。

acceptance_criteria: 能抽取合同基础字段和关键条款
能识别缺失条款和特殊条款
条款风险能进入 Review Center
报告包含条款证据
phases.notes: Phase 18 完成 contract_review 场景横向扩展。复用现有 task/document/OCR/classification/extraction/linkage/audit/review/report/evaluation 基础框架，新增合同审核 doc_type、合同字段与关键条款 Schema、分类关键词、contract_no 归集、七条 CONTRACT_* 规则、Contract Review + Special Clauses xlsx 导出、Task Center contract_review 创建/上传、Report Center contract_review 预览、synthetic contract review sample data 和后端合同审核端到端测试。未新增 contract_* 专用表，未实现法律意见、合同自动审批、电子签章真伪鉴定、公章真伪鉴定、律师工作流、RBAC 或 Phase 19 功能。

phases.name: RBAC、审计、安全、工程化完善

tasks.title: 实现用户、角色、权限、审计和日志脱敏
tasks.notes: Implemented basic login, password hashing, signed bearer tokens, fixed role permissions, permission dependencies, audit log redaction, and upload content signature validation without adding SSO or new business modules.

tasks.title: 实现登录页、Admin Center 和权限控制 UI
tasks.notes: Implemented login flow, persisted bearer token handling, Admin Center user/role/audit-log views, and permission-based disabling for processing, review, report, RAG, rule, Agent, Bad Case, and Evaluation actions.

tasks.title: 创建 users、roles、user_roles 并兼容历史 nullable user 字段
tasks.notes: Added 0014 migration for users, roles, and user_roles with seeded default roles. Historical actor_name and nullable user-related fields remain compatible; no forced backfill to real user foreign keys was introduced.

tasks.title: 实现 Auth、User、Role、Audit Log API
tasks.notes: Implemented /auth/login, /auth/me, /auth/logout, /users, /roles, and /audit-logs APIs plus route-level 401/403 permission checks for key operations.

tasks.title: 测试登录、权限拒绝、只读限制、日志脱敏和上传安全
tasks.notes: Added RBAC/auth/security API tests covering login, missing-token 401, viewer write denial, reviewer review rights, admin management rights, password_hash omission, audit log redaction, and upload content mismatch rejection. Existing business tests continue to pass.

tasks.title: 评估并按需引入异步任务工程化
tasks.notes: Assessed current synchronous flows and did not introduce Celery or Redis because the existing local demo/test workload remains stable. Added danger_check safety scan for forbidden paths and sensitive keywords.

acceptance_criteria: 角色权限能限制关键操作
字段修正、规则修改、报告导出有审计日志
API Key 和 .env 不提交
上传、OCR 中间文件、报告不进入 Git
日志不输出完整敏感底稿
phases.notes: Phase 19 completed RBAC, security, audit, and engineering hardening. Added users/roles/user_roles migration, basic login and token auth, fixed role permissions, protected key APIs, Admin Center, audit log query, log redaction, stronger upload content validation, and scripts/danger_check.py. Maintained compatibility with historical nullable actor/user fields, did not add enterprise SSO, multi-tenant billing, production KMS, Celery/Redis, Phase 20, or tracker-outside features.

phases.name: 最终验收、文档整理、作品集展示材料

tasks.title: 清理 API、确认错误处理和 migration 可复现
整理演示路径、截图、空状态和基础响应式
输出数据库结构文档并确认 demo 数据安全
输出 API reference 并确认接口一致
运行完整 pytest、E2E demo、Post-MVP smoke 和安全 checklist
整理 README、架构、API、数据库、规则、RAG、Agent、Review、Evaluation 和作品集材料

acceptance_criteria: README 可指导新环境启动
docs 覆盖架构、API、数据库、Rule Engine、RAG、Agent、Review、Evaluation、安全
演示材料不夸大商业落地或真实客户使用
作品集材料清楚说明使用模拟或公开数据
最终验收 checklist 全部完成
